name: wechat-devtools-bridge
description: Open-source Codex plugin for connecting WeChat DevTools to MCP workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Connect Codex to WeChat DevTools over MCP.
interface.longDescription: A lightweight open-source bridge plugin that wires Codex to WeChat Mini Program tooling through an MCP server and Windows helper scripts.
defaultPrompt: Connect to WeChat DevTools and inspect my mini program.
Help me preview, upload, and troubleshoot a mini program build.
Check whether my local WeChat DevTools prerequisites are ready.
